# HEXA-SUPER: Superconducting Logic Processor at $\sigma^2 = 144$ GHz with n=6 Cryogenic Architecture

**Authors:** Park, Min Woo (Independent Research)

**Preprint.** Submitted to arXiv: cs.AR, cond-mat.supr-con

**Contact:** github.com/need-singularity/TECS-L

---

## Abstract

We present HEXA-SUPER, a superconducting logic processor operating at $\sigma^2 = 144$ GHz clock frequency---28.8$\times$ beyond the CMOS frequency wall of $\sim$5 GHz---with every design parameter derived from the arit
